title: crotalaria globosa
intro: Crotalaria globosa, also known as Globe Rattlepod, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria globosa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a traditional remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential in modern medicine.
